headlines.title: Zohran Mamdani’s picks take key House primaries amid a broad battle over Democrats’ direction
headlines.description: Three of the New York mayor’s candidates have won contested races, part of a slate of House primaries flush with influence and campaign cash.

headlines.title: Trump accuses oil companies of gas price ‘gouging,’ calls for DOJ probe
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said Wednesday that he had instructed the Department of Justice to immediately probe oil companies for not lowering gas prices at the pump in line with falling costs, accusing them of “gouging” consumers.

headlines.title: House Republicans prepare ad blitz to lock in Florida and Virginia redistricting wins
headlines.description: House Republicans are looking to capitalize on recent redistricting developments in Florida and Virginia, with a GOP super PAC announcing it plans to spend millions more in those states this fall.

headlines.title: Maryland Senate president defeats Democratic primary challenger amid redistricting anger
headlines.description: Senate President Bill Ferguson defeated activist Bobby LaPin in the legislative race in Baltimore, The Associated Press projected.

headlines.title: New York Primary Election 2026: Mayor Mamdani’s Picks Win Big
headlines.description: All three of the congressional candidates endorsed by New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani were victorious in the closely-watched races, dealing a massive blow for establishment Democrats. Meanwhile, Jack Schlossberg, the 33-year-old grandson of former President John F. Kennedy, failed in his bid to win a congressional seat in Manhattan.

headlines.title: Trump Calls for Investigation Into Gasoline ‘Price Gouging’
headlines.description: In a late-night social media post, President Donald Trump said he has instructed the Department of Justice to investigate oil companies for not lowering gas prices at the pump, accusing them of “gouging” consumers.

headlines.title: Pentagon Seeks $80B to Cover Costs of US War With Iran
headlines.description: A number of Republicans in the Senate voted with Democrats on Tuesday to limit President Donald Trump’s war powers, amid ongoing fragile talks with Iran aimed at ending that conflict. It comes as the Pentagon is asking Congress for roughly $80 billion to cover the cost of that war. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Bill Gates tells Congress he suspected Jeffrey Epstein ‘contemplated blackmailing’ him
headlines.description: Gates also said he knew Epstein had a criminal conviction of a “sexual nature,” which he said he “probably should have” dug into.

headlines.title: Senate rebukes Trump by approving House-passed measure calling for end to Iran war
headlines.description: The largely symbolic measure passed as the U.S. and Iran are in the early stages of talks aimed at ending the war.
